title: BLUEPRINT: VinFast Callbot
summary: Locked architectural blueprint for the VinFast Vietnamese customer-service callbot, documenting 12 accepted design decisions covering ASR, normalization, LangGraph orchestration, data contracts, and cross-track interface seams.
key_decisions: D1: PhoWhisper-CT2 first, generic faster-whisper fallback
D2: Normalize per field-type, after LLM extraction (not pre-LLM whole-utterance)
D3: Garbled exception #5 triggered by validator parse_failed, not ASR confidence
D4: I/O timeout/disconnect hangup (#8) routes to engine.finalize() from pipeline
D5: Collect >= 5 real Vietnamese audio clips for WER evaluation (Track B owns)
D6: Keep current track split — Track A solo on critical path
D7: LLM judge uses strongest available cloud model at dev-time only, documented
D8: Setup scripts pull models; pin minimum hardware requirements
D9: Define allowed value sets for classification fields (vehicle_type, vehicle_usage_type, customer_type)
D10: Always readback phone/plate/VIN (READBACK_REQUIRED) before confirming
D11: Report E2E latency per turn plus per-component breakdown
D12: Use LangGraph StateGraph for multi-intent routing and checkpointing
